  Details:
  Researched and authored briefs/2026-06-05_dtc_paid_ads_brief_hubert_yee.md (+ generated shareable PDF) framing Agroverse's scope and the DTC paid-acquisition opportunity for advisory input from Hubert Yee (DAO member; performance-marketing veteran). Work included: pulling repeat-order evidence from Gmail (Shoreline WA customer, Dec 2025 + May 2026 Stripe orders ~1 bag/1.5mo consumption; The Way Home Shop zero-touch onboarding thread), Shipment Ledger Listing scope (18 managed ledgers), unit economics (USD25/200g bag with ~USD8 retailer commission as CAC headroom; new 50g chocolate bar USD10 retail / USD6 cost incl tree planting, first 40+ run sold out), single-estate vintage positioning, QR scan-to-buy + tree-update email retention loop, competitive landscape from ceremonial_cacao_seo Playwright crawls (Ora Cacao et al) and DataForSEO search volumes, and 9 specific questions on channel sequencing, budget floor, measurement stack, KPI framing, creative, entry-offer strategy, landing, process, and failure modes. PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/152 (merged).
